title: Pipe chart: full structure names + pro UI
description:
Pipe chart structure labels like SSMH-A5 to SSMH-A4 were getting cut down to incomplete names (for example showing SSMH alone). Parsing now keeps the full compound structure IDs from WinCan OBJ_Key, and the chart prefers the fuller name when NODE and OBJ_Key both exist.

The Pipe chart panel also got a cleaner production layout: clear From → To header, length/direction chips, a short how-to line, and a simple legend so anyone can read the run without guessing.

Who is affected: PipeShare WinCan pipe chart on BASE (and SaaS after Push).
changeLog: Fix structure names like SSMH-A5 / SSMH-A4 so they are never truncated on the pipe chart.
Prefer fuller structure labels when NODE and OBJ_Key disagree in length.
Redesign pipe chart header: From → To, length, direction, observation count.
Add legend and short how-to (click mark / drag pipe) for clearer use.
